ai_code:
# Feature 1: Shipping delay indicator - difference between actual and scheduled days
df['shipping_delay'] = df['days_for_shipping_real'] - df['days_for_shipment_scheduled']

# Feature 2: Shipping schedule efficiency - ratio of scheduled to actual days
df['shipping_efficiency'] = df['days_for_shipment_scheduled'] / (df['days_for_shipping_real'] + 0.1)

# Feature 3: Complex non-linear interaction between shipping times
df['shipping_time_interaction'] = (df['days_for_shipping_real'] ** 2) / (df['days_for_shipment_scheduled'] + 1)

# Feature 4: Revenue efficiency - benefit per order relative to sales per customer
df['revenue_efficiency'] = df['benefit_per_order'] / (df['sales_per_customer'] + 1)

# Feature 5: Shipping pressure indicator - combines delay with absolute shipping time
df['shipping_pressure'] = df['shipping_delay'] * df['days_for_shipping_real']
